description_long: This is a two-story hardware store with a traditional Japanese architectural influence, featuring a blue-tiled gabled roof and a striped green-and-white awning covering the storefront. The ground floor has a large window and a recessed entrance, with a black signboard and a wooden shuttered window. The upper floor includes sliding shoji-style windows and a circular window with vertical bars, while an external staircase leads to the second floor. The exterior is finished with a mix of light-colored plaster, wood, and tile, and a green trash bin is positioned near the side. A utility pole with wires is visible adjacent to the building, and the tiled pavement extends around the structure. The overall design suggests a compact, urban hardware store with a blend of functional and decorative elements.
description: A compact, two-story hardware store with a blue-tiled roof, striped awning, and traditional Japanese design elements. Features include a recessed entrance, wooden shutters, and an external staircase.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped awning, black signboard, main entrance, and large window with wooden shutters.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular window, external staircase, and tiled pavement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the staircase, upper floor sliding windows, and a green trash bin.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the striped awning, utility pole, and a window with wooden shutters.
attribute_storefront_signage: A black rectangular signboard is mounted above the entrance, with no visible text or logos.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a striped awning over a recessed entrance and large window, with a black signboard above. The exterior includes tiled pavement, a side staircase, and a green trash bin.
